summary: Repeated command noise obscures verification signals and requires artifact revision before the packet can be treated as defended.

findings.title: Repeated command noise obscures verification signal
findings.summary: The packet contains excessive repeated command noise that drowns out the actual verification evidence, requiring artifact revision to restore signal clarity.
